# Cường Thông Gió — Industrial Ventilation & HVAC Expert in Da Nang, Vietnam

> Công ty TNHH MTV Cường Thông Gió (Cuong Thong Gio Co., Ltd) is the leading industrial ventilation company in Da Nang and Central Vietnam. Founded in 2015, with 13+ years of industry experience and 2,145+ completed projects.

## Company Information
- **Full Name:** Công ty TNHH MTV Cường Thông Gió
- **English Name:** Cuong Thong Gio Co., Ltd
- **Tax ID:** 0401686548
- **Founded:** 2015
- **Location:** 101 Trần Quý Khoách, P. Hòa Khánh, Q. Liên Chiểu, TP. Đà Nẵng, Vietnam
- **Hotline:** 0905 001 224
- **Email:** phantrongcuong77@gmail.com
- **Working Hours:** Mon–Sat 08:00–17:00
- **Founder:** Phan Trọng Cường (Mechanical Ventilation Engineer)
- **Slogan:** "Làm chủ công nghệ và kỹ thuật thông gió" (Mastering ventilation technology)

## Products
- **Centrifugal Fans (Quạt ly tâm):** Industrial centrifugal fans 1.5kW–200kW, static pressure up to 3,000 Pa
- **Axial Fans (Quạt hướng trục):** Industrial axial fans 1.1kW–200kW, airflow up to 150,000 m³/h
- **Air Ducts (Ống gió):** Galvanized steel & Inox 304/201, SMACNA standard, CNC Plasma fabrication
- **Volume Control Dampers (VCD):** Square screw-type volume control dampers
- **4-Way Diffusers (Miệng gió):** 300x300mm to 600x600mm aluminum diffusers
- **Cassette Air Conditioners:** 1.5HP–5HP ceiling cassette units
- **Fire Dampers:** Temperature-activated at 72°C per TCVN 7336:2021
- **Cooling Pad Systems:** Evaporative cooling for factory temperature reduction

## Services
- **Factory Ventilation Systems:** Design, manufacture, and install complete ventilation systems for factories and warehouses
- **Air Duct Fabrication:** CNC Plasma cutting, SMACNA standard ductwork in galvanized steel and stainless steel
- **Exhaust Gas & Dust Treatment:** Baghouse filters, cyclone separators, wet scrubbers, ESP — QCVN compliant
- **Basement Fire Ventilation (PCCC):** Heat-resistant fans (300°C/2h), jet fans, fire dampers — QCVN 06:2022/BXD compliant
- **Industrial Kitchen Exhaust:** Stainless steel hoods, grease traps, heat-resistant fans for restaurants and commercial kitchens
- **Industrial Dust Collection:** Wood dust, metal dust, textile dust extraction systems
- **Cooling Pad Installation:** Factory cooling solutions reducing temperature by 5-10°C

## Service Area
- **Primary:** Da Nang (Đà Nẵng), Vietnam
- **Industrial Zones:** KCN Hòa Khánh, KCN Hòa Cầm, KCN An Đồn, KCN Thọ Quang, KCN Điện Nam–Điện Ngọc
- **Extended:** Central Vietnam (Quảng Nam, Huế, Quảng Ngãi) — 100km radius from Da Nang

## Key Statistics
- 13+ years of experience
- 2,145+ completed projects
- 150m² manufacturing floor
- 350+ fire ventilation (PCCC) projects
- 127 Google reviews, 4.9/5 average rating

## Technical Standards
- SMACNA (Sheet Metal and Air Conditioning Contractors' National Association)
- TCVN 5687:2010 (Vietnamese ventilation standard)
- QCVN 06:2022/BXD (Vietnamese fire safety code)
- QCVN 19 (Emissions standard)
- TCVN 7336:2021 (Fire damper standard)

## Interactive Tools
- **Airflow Calculator:** Calculate required airflow (ACH method) at /cong-cu/tinh-luu-luong-gio
- **Duct Sizing Calculator:** Calculate duct cross-section dimensions at /cong-cu/tinh-tiet-dien-ong-gio
- **Fan Power Calculator:** Calculate required fan motor power at /cong-cu/tinh-cong-suat-quat
